descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Aggro] to this Skill Slot next turn
[DefeatDuel] Gain 3 [DefenseUp]
[WhenUse] Apply 2 [DefenseUp] to the ally with the lowest HP percentage (3 times per turn)

[WhenUse] Apply 3 [DefenseUp] to the ally with the lowest HP percentage (3 times per turn)
At 5+ [DefenseUp], Clash Power +1

[WhenUse] Apply 4 [DefenseUp] to the ally with the lowest HP percentage (3 times per turn)
At 5+ [DefenseUp], Clash Power +2

coinDescs: Apply 1 [Agility] and 2 [DefenseUp] to the ally with the lowest HP percentage next turn

Apply 1 [Agility] and 2 [DefenseUp] to the ally with the lowest HP percentage next turn
If the ally is a Zwei Association Fixer, apply an additional 1 [Agility], 1 [DefenseUp]

descs.desc: [WhenUse] Gain +3 [Aggro] to this Skill Slot next turn

1020501.name: Territory Protection
1020501.desc: At the start of the combat phase, apply 2 [DefenseUp] to the 2 allies adjacent to this unit on the Dashboard.

1020511.name: Territory Protection
1020511.desc:
At the start of the combat phase, apply 2 [DefenseUp] to the 2 allies adjacent to this unit on the Dashboard.
If the allies' HP is below 50%, apply an additional 2 [DefenseUp]

1020521.name: Protection Request Received
1020521.desc:
At the start of the combat phase, apply 2 [DefenseUp] to the ally with the lowest HP percentage
If target's HP is below 50%, apply an additional 2 [DefenseUp]
